description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a carved face on one side, featuring jagged eyes and a wide, uneven mouth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The pumpkin's surface shows signs of aging and decay, with some areas appearing sunken and discolored, especially around the carved features. The stem is short and slightly dried, positioned at the top center. The back and sides of the pumpkin are uncarved, displaying a natural, slightly rough texture with some blemishes and color variations. The overall shape is round but slightly flattened at the top and bottom. The interior, visible through the carved openings, appears hollow and dark, typical of a pumpkin prepared for display.
description: A decaying orange pumpkin with a carved jack-o'-lantern face, rough texture, and a short stem.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with jagged eyes and a wide, uneven mouth, as well as visible decay around the openings.
description_view_1: Side view with no carvings, showing discoloration and blemishes on the pumpkin's surface.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the short stem and the round, slightly flattened shape of the pumpkin.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the uncarved, natural surface with minor imperfections and the edge of the carved face barely visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two jagged, asymmetrical eyes and a wide, uneven mouth. The features are roughly cut, with some decay and softening around the edges, giving a weathered appearance.
